source_note: Order on the application of Louisville Gas and Electric Company (LG&E) for an adjustment of its electric and gas base rates (forecasted test year), Kentucky PSC Case No. 2025-00114 (companion to KU Case 2025-00113), electric final order issued February 16, 2026.
